results.title: Dissidents being shown the door
results.description: Tucker Carlson said he could no longer support the Republican Party. In that regard, he finds himself in familiar company. A growing faction on the populist right — including figures such as Candace Owens, Marjorie Taylor Greene and Nick Fuentes...

results.title: Norfolk leaders furious at no consultation over bid for 1,200 migrants at RAF Barnham
results.description: Angry leaders at Norfolk County Council have said they were not consulted about government plans to house 1,200 asylum seekers at RAF Barnham.
